name: @radzor/email-template
description: Render email templates with variable interpolation using Handlebars-style syntax. Register reusable templates, render to HTML and plain text with data binding, conditionals, and loops.

inputs.name: defaultFrom
inputs.description: Default sender address to include in rendered metadata.

inputs.name: strictMode
inputs.description: If true, throw an error when a template variable is missing from the data context.

outputs.name: renderedHtml
outputs.description: The rendered HTML output of the template.

outputs.name: renderedText
outputs.description: The rendered plain-text output of the template (HTML tags stripped).

events.name: onRendered
events.description: Fired after a template is successfully rendered.

actions.name: render

params.name: templateName
params.description: Name of a previously registered template.

actions.description: Render a registered template with the given data context.

llm.constraints: No external dependencies — uses a built-in Handlebars-compatible engine. Templates must be registered before rendering. Supports {{var}}, {{#if}}, {{#each}}, and {{#unless}} blocks. Does not support custom helpers.
